name: Unexpected Date // Jillian
description:
<||Unexpected date with your best friend||>

Eyyyy a new bot and it didn't take more than 20 years for me to make another one woohoo!

It still took long since I didn't have any inspiration or good suggestions for a bot so I made this one, and I wanted it to be a original character so its not a overrated bot.

Anyways hope you guys enjoy this bot!!!

Art by: v4mp1333
